Title: Provides that the additional sales tax that Cortland county is authorized to impose shall not be subject to preemption
Summary: Provides that the additional rate of sales and compensating use tax imposed by Cortland county shall not be subject to preemption.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law, in relation to providing that the additional rate of sales and compensating use tax imposed by Cortland county shall not be subject to preemption
